spec.title: Raspberry Pi 5 firmware (pi5_exporter)
spec.description: PMIC per-rail power, decoded throttle/under-voltage state, firmware voltages and clocks, SoC/PMIC temperature, and the RTC backup cell, sourced from pi5_exporter over the VideoCore mailbox. Complements node_exporter.

spec.title: Measured power
spec.description: Sum of PMIC-measured rails (not total board input power).

spec.expr: up{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on(instance) pi5_board_info{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}

spec.title: Issues since boot
spec.description: Count of throttle/under-voltage flags latched since power-on (clears only on power-cycle).

spec.title: Metrics age
spec.description: Age of the served snapshot (climbing = stuck collection loop).

spec.title: Throttle / under-voltage (live)
spec.description: Live get_throttled bits 0-3, decoded per flag.

spec.title: Power by rail
spec.description: Per-rail power (V x A), rails exposing both channels.

spec.title: PMIC rails
spec.description: Per-rail voltage / current / power. Empty cells = rail exposes only one channel.

spec.title: RTC trickle-charge
spec.description: Charge target (0 = charging disabled) and configured bounds.

spec.title: Collector success
spec.description: 1 = collector succeeded last cycle. Failed collectors drop their data series.

spec.title: Snapshot age & collection duration
spec.description: Served-snapshot age (climbing = stuck loop) and last collection-cycle duration.

spec.title: Collector status
spec.description: Per-collector success, last scrape duration, and time since last success.

spec.title: Board & exporter build
spec.description: Board identity (pi5_board_info) and exporter build metadata.
